political.s: FEC: $267K in executive political donations; partisan lean split across 13 executive donors.

charity.s: Via parent company Coca-Cola: $165M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.36% of revenue) via Coca-Cola Foundation. Drucker Institute Management Top 250 — ranked #13 (2024) on customer satisfaction, employee engagement, innovation, social responsibility, and financial strength. Fortune World's Most Admired Companies — ranked #19 (2024). Newsweek Most Trustworthy Companies in America — ranked #5 (2024).
charity.focus: Military/Veterans, First Responders, Athlete Charities, Cancer Research, Multiple Sclerosis, Homelessness

labor.s: Via parent company Coca-Cola: 123 federal penalties totaling $265.8M since 2000 (Violation Tracker). Supply-chain signals: KnowTheChain 58/100; CHRB 13.8/26; TVPRA exposure; UK MS statement; AU MS statement.

dei.s: Via parent company Coca-Cola: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 100/100 — Equality 100 Leader (2025). Top-rated LGBTQ+ workplace policies, benefits, and culture. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

animals.s: Via parent company Coca-Cola: Ethical Consumer Avoid — environment + plastic-pollution + tax + political-donations concerns. [ethical-consumer]

execPay.s: Via parent company Coca-Cola: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 739:1 (median employee pay $17,947) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).

wiki.extract:
Monster Energy is a brand of energy drinks that was created
by Hansen Natural Company (now Monster Beverage Corporation) in April 2002 and released to the public with its original flavor on April 18, 2002. In 2022, Monster Energy had a 30.1% share of the American energy drink market, the second-highest after Red Bull.
As of March 2026, there are over 300 different flavors under the Monster brand worldwide, including its core Monster Energy line, Java Monster, Zero Ultra, Juice, Maxx, Hydro, HydroSport, Nitro, Shot, Nitrous, XXL, BFC, Extra Strength, Dragon Tea, Muscle, Import, Export, Coffee,

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy

health.s: Via parent company Coca-Cola: 3 CPSC recalls on record; sample hazard: the inner wall of the double-walled glasses can break easily.
